name: liminal-salt
description: Frontend build tooling for Liminal Salt (Tailwind + vendored JS deps).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n tailwind,server -c blue,green "npm run watch:css" "cargo run -p liminal-salt"
scripts.vendor: mkdir -p crates/liminal-salt/static/vendor && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js crates/liminal-salt/static/vendor/htmx.min.js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js crates/liminal-salt/static/vendor/alpinejs.min.js
